# Kidney Genetics Database (KGDB)

> Evidence-based kidney disease gene curation with multi-source integration

The Kidney Genetics Database (KGDB) is a curated resource of kidney disease-associated genes with evidence scoring from multiple authoritative sources including ClinGen, PanelApp, GenCC, HPO, and PubTator.

## Key Resources

- [Gene Browser](https://kidney-genetics.org/genes): Search and filter 5,000+ kidney disease genes
- [API Documentation](https://kidney-genetics.org/api/docs): JSON:API compliant REST API
- [Data Sources](https://kidney-genetics.org/data-sources): Live status of integrated genomic data sources
- [About](https://kidney-genetics.org/about): Methodology and core concepts
- [GitHub](https://github.com/berntpopp/kidney-genetics-db): Open source repository
